title: Rulebook Errata
text: Errata will be added as needed in future Grimoire updates.

title: Campaign Guide Errata
text: Errata will be added as needed in future Grimoire updates.

ruling: This card's ability should read "If you succeed and the attacked enemy is the only enemy engaged with you..."
This card's ability should read "You succeed at that skill test by 0 instead."
This card should have a wild skill icon.
This card's ability should read "Evade that enemy. You get +1 skill value for this evasion."
This card's ability should read "Investigate attached location. You get +1 skill value for this investigation."
This card's ability should read “If you succeed, you may discard Lie in Wait for this attack to deal +1 damage."
This card's keyword line should read "If there are no supplies on Hunter's Instinct, discard it."
